```js
const path =
"/postgres/clusters/c95847135a8041ff80c4e12f15b07c29/database_schemas";
const request_address = "http://10.10.40.25:21080/api/v1" + path;
const options = (i) => ({
request_address,

method: "POST",

body: {

characterSet: "UTF8",

lc_collate: "C",

lc_ctype: "C",

name: `test${i}`,

},

headers: {

"Content-Type": "application/json; charset=UTF-8",

Cookie:

"Chat2db-Organization-Id=1; Chat2db-Dept-Name=YWRtaW4=; Chat2DB-Country=CN; Chat2db-BS-TOKEN=MzY=; Chat2db-Organization-; CHAT2DB=fa1ef333-75c5-48b7-a4e7-4b9e4294173e; Chat2db-Dept-Id=MjAxMTAwNDQ5Mjg5NzIwNjI3NA==; CaptchaIds=o_Yqbym0axqQ0550crE2t9U3ph6ZPAd5x5td7HsFNKXCpLVAAvufI8VDVX2vtLzL42yWwk5Cz4mH-UgGrLPiJEOzgxs34ieICeheTEqCiLokB_5aSfkj6DSWkZNRhRJPO5w6zav9zEF_YvRZ3w3Ar8jRYPvByaJ1eCOJwfz-sBS52rdm6E20Yct6OVn_UflrRw==; locale=zh-cn; USER_ID_KEY=847798ee3db44716b6357b04e5a55c16; AMP_16e8798ff2=JTdCJTIyZGV2aWNlSWQlMjIlM0ElMjJjMzNlOTg0Mi0wNDQxLTRiMDctYjA2Mi0zMGM2M2MxNDA3MTElMjIlMkMlMjJzZXNzaW9uSWQlMjIlM0ExNzY2MDMwNTA0NzcwJTJDJTIyb3B0T3V0JTIyJTNBZmFsc2UlMkMlMjJwYWdlQ291bnRlciUyMiUzQTAlN0Q=; AuthCookie=rds-hLQnR28c-CLljbY5NfxKBrvM2D-QeFtcQ1m_AD-K9Nk; AuthCookieKey=32366df82ec84a039e334bcc82e2faab; projectUuid=*",

},

});

  

const task = async (i) => {

const { request_address, method, body, headers } = options(i);

  

try {

const response = await fetch(request_address, {

method,

headers,

body: JSON.stringify(body),

});

  

if (response.ok) {

console.log(i + "请求成功");

} else {

const errorBody = await response.text();

console.log("请求失败", response.status, errorBody);

}

} catch (error) {

console.error("请求出错", error.message);

}

};

  

const runWithConcurrency = async (tasks, maxConcurrency) => {

const results = []

const executing = []

  

for(let i = 0; i < tasks.length; i++) {

const task = tasks[i]

  

// 到达最大并发数，等待其中一个执行完成

if(executing.length >= maxConcurrency) {

await Promise.race(executing)

}

  

// 启动一个任务

const promise = (async () => {

const res = await task()

executing.splice(executing.indexOf(promise), 1)

results.push(res)

})()

  

executing.push(promise)

}

  

// 等待其他任务完成

await Promise.all(executing)

return results

}

  

(async () => {

const tasks = []

for(let i = 6; i < 10; i++) {

tasks.push(() => task(i))

}

  

await runWithConcurrency(tasks, 3)

})()
```
